title: BEM-568 fix token smoke YAML
objective:
Run script:
"""
wfs=Path('.github/workflows'); wfs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
wf=wfs/'claude-token-smoke.yml'
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Token Smoke

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write

jobs:
  check-secret:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Check secret presence and write report
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        run: python3 scripts/claude_token_smoke.py

      - name: Commit smoke result
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md governance/transport/results.jsonl
          git commit -m "BEM-568 Claude token smoke result" || echo "No changes"
          git push
''')
scripts=Path('scripts'); scripts.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
smoke=scripts/'claude_token_smoke.py'
smoke.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path

token = os.environ.get("CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN", "")
status = "secret_present" if token else "secret_missing"
blocker = None if token else {"code": "CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN_MISSING"}

Path("governance/reports").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path("governance/transport").mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

report = Path("governance/reports/bem568_claude_token_secret_smoke.md")
report.write_text(
    "# BEM-568 | Claude Token Secret Smoke | " + status + "\n\n"
    "Дата: workflow_runtime\n\n"
    "## Result\n"
    "CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN presence check: " + status + "\n\n"
    "## Security\n"
    "Token value was not printed.\n\n"
    "## Blocker\n"
    + ("null" if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + "\n",
    encoding="utf-8",
)

rec = {
    "record_type": "claude_token_secret_smoke",
    "cycle_id": "bem568-claude-token-secret-smoke",
    "source": "github-actions",
    "status": status,
    "artifact_path": str(report),
    "commit_sha": None,
    "blocker": blocker,
    "created_at": "workflow_runtime",
}
with Path("governance/transport/results.jsonl").open("a", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(rec, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")
print("CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN presence check:", status)
''')
report=reports/'bem568_fix_claude_token_smoke_yaml.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-568 | Fix Claude Token Smoke YAML | PASS\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 20:58 (UTC+3)\n\n## Result\nInvalid inline here-doc workflow replaced by valid workflow that calls `scripts/claude_token_smoke.py`.\n\n## Security\nToken value is never printed; only secret_present/secret_missing status is printed.\n\n## Blocker\nnull\n')
record={'record_type':'bem568_fix_claude_token_smoke_yaml','cycle_id':'bem568-fix-claude-token-smoke-yaml','source':'gpt','status':'completed','workflow':str(wf),'script':str(smoke),'commit_sha':None,'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 20:58 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as f: f.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem568_fix_claude_token_smoke_yaml']={'status':'completed','workflow':str(wf),'script':str(smoke),'blocker':None}
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 20:58 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
proof=proofs/'bem568_fix_claude_token_smoke_yaml.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-568 PASS: claude-token-smoke.yml YAML fixed by moving report generation to script.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(wf),str(smoke),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Fixed invalid claude-token-smoke.yml YAML by replacing inline here-doc with script-based smoke check')
"""
No issue comments.
